one_time_description: Transfer from Agricultural Benefits Trust Fund to Nation; also Trust Fund revenue of $835,764 received as distribution from trust
economic_notes: Six controlled entities accounted for by modified equity method: Wapsewsepi Enterprises Ltd., Creeland Resources Inc., Swan River Land Corporation, Swan River Grocery Limited Partnership, Swan River Liquor Limited Partnership, 18805424 Alberta Ltd. Swan River Grocery LP reported revenues of $3,756,799. Agricultural Benefits Trust Fund held at RBC Wealth Management totalling $36.6M. Nation has a $200,000 line of credit with Peace Hills Trust at prime plus 2%.
notes: Audit is QUALIFIED due to non-recognition of Asset Retirement Obligations (PS 3280). Six entities accounted for by modified equity method (not consolidated). Two entities appear fully consolidated (Operating Fund and Trust Funds). The Statement of Change in Net Financial Assets shows excess of revenues over expenditures as $2,333,581 which differs from the income statement figure of $160,596 — the larger figure includes trust fund earnings and enterprise earnings not in the main income statement. Total government transfers calculated as ISC $16,802,129 + LSLIRC $30,000 + Health Canada $2,481,889 + ISET $704,671 + CMHC $74,157 + Government of Alberta $522,165 + FNDF $683,644 = $21,298,655. OSR is Other revenue $3,327,515. Annual debt service of $384,100 per cash flow statement (principal repayments only; new RBC loan of $1,900,000 acquired during year). Schedule of remuneration not included in the provided financial statements.
